utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All five appear in the final coverage plan. Check specificity: (1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with stated monthly costs and details—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with a monthly cost and coverage limits—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with a monthly cost and coverage features—fully specified. (4) additional_services: enhancement services described and cost specified (included at €0/month)—fully specified. (5) total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown, plus comparative savings and dates—fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named products: PrimeCare Premium Physical Health, PrimeCare Premium Mental Health, EliteHome Premium Coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan. I matched these to the ground-truth rating entries with the closest exact names: PrimeCare Premium Plan (under primary_health_coverage.physical_health) for the physical health line, PrimeCare Premium Plan (under primary_health_coverage.mental_health) for the mental health line, EliteHome Premium Coverage (under property_protection.home_content), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance). Their corresponding ratings in the ground-truth are 10, 10, 10, and 10 respectively.
